name: George, Me
subject: Wanted to make sure you got this, Peter (1776 Club)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This opportunity comes once in a lifetime.

**DAYS LEFT TO JOIN : 3**

Peter, did you miss this invite to the 1776 Donor Club?

We only invited our top patriots, so we wanted to make sure this didn't get lost in your inbox! Our membership is filling up at unprecedented rates and the invite expires in just THREE DAYS.

[**JOIN THE 1776 CLUB NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57869385:6ByTB7lqN:m:1:3253819041:0661AD07A02F9871B94E03B089545A34:r)

We can't fight this fight without you. When things got tough for our Founding Fathers, they didn't give up. They held the line to create our freedom-loving nation for us and generations to come.

If you're a fighter like them, who believes in America, [**join the 1776 Donor Club TODAY.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57869385:6ByTB7lqN:m:1:3253819041:0661AD07A02F9871B94E03B089545A34:r)

George
1776 Donor Club

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **1776 Donor Club**
Date: Thu, July 1, 2021 at 4:58 PM
Subject: Don't let this exclusive invite go to waste....

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57869385:6ByTB7lqN:m:1:3253819041:0661AD07A02F9871B94E03B089545A34:r)

Peter,

An Independence Day like no other is coming. Like our Founding Fathers centuries ago, we once again have to fight against tyranny, oppression, and persecution: **not from Britain, but from the Radical Left!**

That's why we've created the **1776 Donor Club** : a group of America First Patriots who will stop at nothing to preserve our freedom in the face of frightening odds.

[_**And Peter, we 've selected YOU for membership in this group of Top Trump Patriots, but your offer won't last! Will you stand with us before your invitation expires?**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57869385:6ByTB7lqN:m:1:3253819041:0661AD07A02F9871B94E03B089545A34:r)

_**Join the 1776 Donor Club Before Your Offer Expires**_
[**ACCEPT INVITATION**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57869385:6ByTB7lqN:m:1:3253819041:0661AD07A02F9871B94E03B089545A34:r)

[**To join, all you have to do is chip in $17.76 to help freedom loving patriots across the nation fight back against the Left 's attacks.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57869385:6ByTB7lqN:m:1:3253819041:0661AD07A02F9871B94E03B089545A34:r)

Peter, Trump and House Conservatives need your help more than ever. If you abandon the 1776 Donor Club, we risk losing critical victories in our effort to take back the House.

If you don't care about this country or its freedoms, ignore this email. [**But if you refuse to let your freedoms vanish without a fight, stand up to the Radical Left, donate $17.76 or more, and join the 1776 Donor Club today!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57869385:6ByTB7lqN:m:1:3253819041:0661AD07A02F9871B94E03B089545A34:r)

_Act quickly before your invitation expires! _

Thank you,

1776 Donor Club

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57869385:6ByTB7lqN:m:1:3253819041:0661AD07A02F9871B94E03B089545A34:r)

body:

**OFFICIAL GOP COMMUNICATION -- 07/05/2021**
Hey Peter -- Please take a moment and read this UNBELIEVABLE report to understand the urgency of our situation:
* * *
"House Democrats introduced a Homeland Security Department spending bill Tuesday that aims to wipe away large chunks of President Trump's legacy, including restrictions on deploying agency personnel to police protests and clawing back more than $2 billion in border wall money" \-- Washington Times
* * *
Trump's legacy AND America's security are hanging in the balance. Please rush $7 to stand with Trump and secure our borders. **[SAVE TRUMP'S LEGACY.
SECURE OUR BORDER.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57869937:JYsEF7l9N:m:1:3253819041:47AE4A7CCAF6D23098CFBBB7619CDBB0:r)** President Trump just got back from his visit to the border where he outlined a 700% monthly increase in illegal border crossings, a 260% spike in fentanyl seizures, and drug cartels expanding their power. _Democrats are not just ignoring the problem -- they're actively making it worse!_ Stopping them will be impossible without an overwhelming response from ALL of our grassroots network of Conservatives. **Will you do your part?** This is a pressing matter you can't ignore. **[SAVE TRUMP'S LEGACY.
SECURE OUR BORDER.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57869937:JYsEF7l9N:m:1:3253819041:47AE4A7CCAF6D23098CFBBB7619CDBB0:r)** Thanks for all you do. **Official GOP Notifications**

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: What Tucker Carlson said, Peter…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57869813:6-Cp47lNP:m:1:3253819041:CD65CC3F08CB2DA21EB1484228689F42:r) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you're thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I'll tell you why. I've seen what's happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I'm sure you have too. All over the country, teachers are brainwashing children to hate themselves and hate their country. They tell students that if they're white they're evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they're black they're helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. _It 's state sanctioned racism, plain and simple._ **And it doesn 't matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a leg in this race.** ** ** **[Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help us fight the spread of Critical Race Theory and elect conservatives who care about the truth.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57869813:6-Cp47lNP:m:1:3253819041:CD65CC3F08CB2DA21EB1484228689F42:r)** Because if the radical Left succeeds in brainwashing an entire generation, America won't survive. _The generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it._ They will beg our leaders to strip us of our rights and freedoms until we have none left. They will run our country into the ground and create chaos and despair where we once had prosperity and excellence. **They will surrender our country to Marxism, and we may never get it back.** The sacrifices of our forefathers will have been for nothing, our wars will have been fought for nothing, and our proud history will be reduced to nothing. [**But there 's something you can do.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57869813:6-Cp47lNP:m:1:3253819041:CD65CC3F08CB2DA21EB1484228689F42:r) That's why I'm writing to you today. Because our fate isn't sealed -- yet.__But we must act now.__ My name is Ryan Girdusky and I've made it my mission to make education sane again. I created the 1776 Project Political Action Committee to do what our politicians won't and take back our schools. **I 'm going state to state and county to county targeting school board elections, campaigning and fundraising for candidates that will take a strong stance against Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project.** But I don't stand a chance without you. [**Please donate $35 or more to the 1776 Project PAC and save our schools from race-baiting, America-hating Marxists.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57869813:6-Cp47lNP:m:1:3253819041:CD65CC3F08CB2DA21EB1484228689F42:r) And make no mistake -- this isn't just a California or New York problem. **Critical Race Theory is already being taught in EVERY SINGLE state.** It's happening from coast to coast, in red, blue and purple states alike. And if we don't take action, we'll all pay the price. You and I have to take a stand NOW. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57869813:6-Cp47lNP:m:1:3253819041:CD65CC3F08CB2DA21EB1484228689F42:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57869813:6-Cp47lNP:m:1:3253819041:CD65CC3F08CB2DA21EB1484228689F42:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57869813:6-Cp47lNP:m:1:3253819041:CD65CC3F08CB2DA21EB1484228689F42:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
184 7th Ave #106, New York, NY 10011 Not Authorized by any candidate or campaign committee

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: We’ve got to act on climate now (petition)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Sign the petition >> [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31925991/294167398/-272948131?refcode=MTH_em_20210705_X_ENG_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_MTH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2QyNWY2NC1hZWRkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=68t2_uyFbHGC0UA_Uf-YW3KAs2Vrh4ormHhatfG_dMU=&emci=cc9db45d-aedd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a7d25f64-aedd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
---
Here’s the long and short of it, folks: We’ve got to act boldly on climate right now. It’s the only way to preserve our planet for future generations. One of the most immediate, actionable ways we can address climate change is by electrifying our households. All of the technology we need to do it already exists. From heating and cooling to cooking and transportation, our households make up about 42% of our country’s energy-related emissions. But we need to make zero-emission homes—and all the cost savings and health benefits that come with it—accessible to everyone. That’s why I will be introducing the _Zero-Emission Homes Act of 2021_ to act on climate and put money back in people’s pockets at the same time. If we pass this legislation, we can give folks rebates for the purchase and installation of zero-emission electric appliances and equipment. We can create millions of good-paying jobs. And we can take a huge step in eliminating carbon pollution from America’s 121 million homes. [**So, will you sign my petition to become a citizen co-sponsor of the _Zero-Emission Homes Act of 2021_? It would mean a lot for you to call for bold climate action and job creation along with me.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31925993/294167411/-1487944865?refcode=MTH_em_20210705_X_ENG_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_MTH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2QyNWY2NC1hZWRkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=68t2_uyFbHGC0UA_Uf-YW3KAs2Vrh4ormHhatfG_dMU=&emci=cc9db45d-aedd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a7d25f64-aedd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045) | [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31925999/294167422/-1487944865?refcode=MTH_em_20210705_X_ENG_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_MTH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2QyNWY2NC1hZWRkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=68t2_uyFbHGC0UA_Uf-YW3KAs2Vrh4ormHhatfG_dMU=&emci=cc9db45d-aedd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a7d25f64-aedd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)

Thank you for speaking out for our planet.
—Martin

clean_body: Sign the petition >> Here’s the long and short of it, folks: We’ve got to act boldly on climate right now. It’s the only way to preserve our planet for future generations. One of the most immediate, actionable ways we can address climate change is by electrifying our households. All of the technology we need to do it already exists. From heating and cooling to cooking and transportation, our households make up about 42% of our country’s energy-related emissions. But we need to make zero-emission homes—and all the cost savings and health benefits that come with it—accessible to everyone. That’s why I will be introducing the Zero-Emission Homes Act of 2021 to act on climate and put money back in people’s pockets at the same time. If we pass this legislation, we can give folks rebates for the purchase and installation of zero-emission electric appliances and equipment. We can create millions of good-paying jobs. And we can take a huge step in eliminating carbon pollution from America’s 121 million homes. | Thank you for speaking out for our planet. —Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. Terry’s opponent says he’s proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement. He even added “Donald Trump represents so much of why I’m running.”
And he’s putting his money where his mouth is. He has supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories and pushed an agenda of restricting voter access.
On the other hand, Terry is a champion for our freedom to vote. As Governor, he restored voting rights to more people than any other Governor in history. He fought hard to make sure Virginia was one of the most welcoming, inclusive and forward-looking places in the country. But if Terry’s opponent wins, he’ll take the Commonwealth backwards. In state after state across the country, we have seen that governors play a large role in determining whether access is restricted or expanded. We must hold the line in Virginia to protect and expand progress.
So here is the deal: if we do our part to elect Terry in Virginia, we can send a message to the entire country that our Democracy is stronger than ever. We can demonstrate that candidates who support voter suppression and Donald Trump’s big lie will be met with a groundswell of grassroots resistance.
[**Please, donate to Terry’s campaign right now and become a part of his historic movement.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31926595/294169899/1097049879?refcode=20210705.2_SA_G&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDBhMDRmYi1iMWRkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zI0ly3q2tdKYhkV9QShse7rxc22rstYSfWW8W2WtIgI=)
I’m counting on you, Derek.
Stacey Abrams

name: Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.)
subject: The Tide Is Turning . . .
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by the Republican Party of Texas P
body:
The tide is turning. Texas just picked up TWO new congressional seats for the 2022 midterm elections. _And, along with Texas, reliably "red" states like Florida, North Carolina, and Montana also picked up a handful of seats._ [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57873981:687INclNy:m:1:3253819041:4FE2E4DED9A3D9F9D021D95C73B692A6:r) In other words, we are within striking distance of taking back the House in 2022 and retiring Nancy Pelosi for good. **_[Will you contribute just $2 to the Republican Party of Texas today to help us win these two critical seats in the upcoming midterm election?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57873981:687INclNy:m:1:3253819041:4FE2E4DED9A3D9F9D021D95C73B692A6:r)_** I know that it seems like bleak times for the conservative movement. But do not forget about what happened in 2020. Even with the highly dubious election procedures, Big Tech censorship, and tidal wave of fake news - Republicans came up just 5 seats short of taking back the House. Now, Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and their progressive socialist minions know that their time in power is fleeting. _That is why they have spent the last six months aggressively ramming their transformative socialist policies through Congress._ We must capitalize on the momentum we gained in 2020 by winning these two new seats and inspiring the rest of the nation to reject the socialist policies of Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer. **_[And, that starts with your small gift of just $2 to the Republican Party of Texas today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57873981:687INclNy:m:1:3253819041:4FE2E4DED9A3D9F9D021D95C73B692A6:r)_** Your contribution of just $2 or more today comes at a critical time. We **_must_** keep up with the massive Democrat fundraising machine pouring millions of dollars into these new congressional districts. Your gift today will give us the resources needed to recruit, train, and elect strong conservatives who will _fight_ and _win_ to advance our conservative, America-first values. **_[That is why I am asking you to send a contribution of $2 or more right away.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57873981:687INclNy:m:1:3253819041:4FE2E4DED9A3D9F9D021D95C73B692A6:r)_** I am counting on you and patriots from across America to help us retire Nancy Pelosi and take back control of the House of Representatives once and for all. Thank you in advance for your timely support. Steadfast and Loyal, Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.) Chairman, Republican Party of Texas **#WeAreTheStorm**
* * *

name: Team Crist
subject: Correcting the DeSantis record
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
Ron DeSantis is spreading disinformation far and wide to make you think he's spent his time in office putting Floridians first ... but all the disinformation in the world can't change reality.
|
---

| | Ron DeSantis is spreading disinformation far and wide to make _you_ , friend, think he's spent his time in office putting Floridians first ... but all the disinformation in the world can't change reality.

So we've gone ahead and corrected some of his statements for you. (**[If you're already fired up to defeat DeSantis, elect Charlie Crist, and build a Florida for All, you can chip in here!](https://act.myngp.com/el/uisrjbqI3pn3JtvMjN_1JQ==/ILetkXb_sSrl1Aej2lOjDw==?refcode=20210705_f_1_fl&amount=25)**)

DeSantis claims he:
* "Strengthened election integrity" >> **WHAT THAT REALLY MEANS >> Enacted voter suppression legislation**
* "Signed anti-rioting legislation" >> **Stomped on the rights of peaceful protestors**
* "Protected women's sports" >> **Signed discrimination against trans kids into law**
* "Kept our state open for business" >> **Ignored medical experts and left the tough decisions to protect Floridians ' lives to local leaders**

Ron DeSantis and his team know full well he can't win on his record, so they're using disinformation and lies to spin his failures in a positive light.

We're here to correct the record: **_Ron DeSantis has only ever put Ron DeSantis first._**

By contrast, **_Charlie Crist 's record -- from his time as State Senator, Commissioner of Education, Attorney General, Governor, and Congressman -- is clear: He puts Floridians first._**

_Are you ready to reject the failed DeSantis record?_

_Are you ready to elect a governor who 'll look out for all Floridians?_

_Are you ready to build a Florida for All?_

**[Pitch in>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/uisrjbqI3pn3JtvMjN_1JQ==/ILetkXb_sSrl1Aej2lOjDw==?refcode=20210705_f_1_fl&amount=25)** | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Ted Cruz
subject: This is what a Republican looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57873944:6orsmclKN:m:1:3253819041:C2C3D9CFA8AD90FBC4134C433428BDEC:r)
---
Peter,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left's game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we're seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what's on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez knows that, too. Last year, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years**. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57873944:6orsmclKN:m:1:3253819041:C2C3D9CFA8AD90FBC4134C433428BDEC:r)
[ THIS IS WHAT REPUBLICANS LOOK LIKE
HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57873944:6orsmclKN:m:1:3253819041:C2C3D9CFA8AD90FBC4134C433428BDEC:r)

Will you please **[chip in $100, $50, or even just $10 right now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57873944:6orsmclKN:m:1:3253819041:C2C3D9CFA8AD90FBC4134C433428BDEC:r)** to help me end 120 years of Democrats holding the congressional seat she's currently running for?

I encouraged Monica to try again - a 6,000 vote deficit is easily overcome with the right message and enough support. **[Monica has my endorsement, but she won 't be able to pull off a win for Republicans everywhere without YOUR HELP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57873944:6orsmclKN:m:1:3253819041:C2C3D9CFA8AD90FBC4134C433428BDEC:r)**.

Monica has set a personal goal of raising $50,000 before June 30th, and I've pledged to do all that I can to help her realize her goal. **[Will you chip-in $100, $50, or even $5 to help send a Latina Republican to Congress?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57873944:6orsmclKN:m:1:3253819041:C2C3D9CFA8AD90FBC4134C433428BDEC:r)**

[ HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57873944:6orsmclKN:m:1:3253819041:C2C3D9CFA8AD90FBC4134C433428BDEC:r)
We need more people like Monica in Congress; she is living proof of the American Dream. She knows that in America, when you set your mind to something you can achieve it. She was raised by a single mother in a Texas border town, despite the hardships, Monica struck out on her own to realize her own American Dream. Armed with her faith and support from her Mother, Monica grew up to become one of the top insurance agents in South Texas.

We need people like Monica in Congress. A woman who knows what hard work is; a woman who has the perseverance and grit to deliver for her community.

**Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you that Monica 's race is one of the best chances we have at flipping a BLUE seat RED!**

On behalf of my friend Monica, **[I'm asking you to give generously](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57873944:6orsmclKN:m:1:3253819041:C2C3D9CFA8AD90FBC4134C433428BDEC:r)** - whatever that means to you. Monica will represent our entire Party in the House, and she'll make us all proud.

[ HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57873944:6orsmclKN:m:1:3253819041:C2C3D9CFA8AD90FBC4134C433428BDEC:r)

Respectfully,
Senator Ted Cruz

[ Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57873944:6orsmclKN:m:1:3253819041:C2C3D9CFA8AD90FBC4134C433428BDEC:r)

| Paid for by Monica for Congress
---

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: 📎 Survey attached for you, response due 11:59 PM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Can I count on you to take my survey before midnight? | | | **My team just reviewed the results of my official July Priorities Survey --****_but they didn 't see your response!_****

I urgently need to hear from you before my survey closes in eight hours so I can build a winning strategy to protect our Majority!

LAST CHANCE: Will you complete my survey before midnight and let me know what's on your mind?

[https://action.dccc.org/survey/july-2021-priority-survey](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/GRD0BZ4-)**

---
| **YOUR URGENT RESPONSE NEEDED:**

My July Priorities Survey closes for good in just eight hours.

And since you're one of my very best grassroots supporters, I wanted to give you one last chance to complete it before then.

**Can I count on you to take my survey before midnight?**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)
---|---|---

I hate to email you on your holiday weekend, but this couldn't wait.

My Official July Priorities Survey closes in just eight hours, and I need every last one of my grassroots supporters (including you) to submit feedback before then.

Let me explain why:

**Republicans are breaking fundraising records and have built staggering momentum to defeat our Majority and take back power.**

But your input in my survey will help develop a winning strategy to STOP Republicans in their tracks, PROTECT my House Democrats, and SAFEGUARD our progress.

[**So please, will you complete my July Priorities Survey before it closes at midnight? There 's just too much at stake to sit this one out >>**](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Thank you,

Nancy
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45253797&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA0MTQ1OTI0NwS2&l=13770015&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45253797&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA0MTQ1OTI0NwS2&l=13770015&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25&recurring=true). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

subject: You only have one shot. Do not miss your chance 🇺🇸

body:
Calling All Patriots: look inside!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57874104:6QuJyclNR:m:1:3253819041:47C7023746AC91839C50BF02CFD5CB30:r)

**The Trump Patriot movement is unstoppable**. From Florida to California, millions of freedom-loving Americans have shown their support for President Trump. But only the most dedicated are invited to join the 1776 Donor Club.

_Congratulations, Peter, you 're one of them!_

[**To join, all you have to do is chip in $17.76 to help freedom loving patriots across the nation fight back against the Left 's attacks.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57874104:6QuJyclNR:m:1:3253819041:47C7023746AC91839C50BF02CFD5CB30:r)

Peter, 245 years ago our Founding Fathers declared independence and embarked on the greatest experiment in history. They laid the plans for a new nation built on the ideals of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

_**But now those freedoms are under attack. And the Radical Left will not stop until they have dismantled this great nation from the inside out.**_

subject: They can't stop us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
The audit is changing America |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=94f281c5c9&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am the Original “Election Integrity” Conservative leading the charge against Election Fraud in Arizona via _America’s Audit._

**We have found evidence of untold fraud in the 2020 election, and we are just beginning.**

There are three steps to our plan:
1. Finish America’s Audit in Arizona.
2. Spread America’s Audit to other states, including Pennsylvania, Michigan, and Georgia.
3. Ensure that future elections are protected!

**And the last part is key! None of this matters if the Democrats can do it again!**

_This is why I am writing you today._

**I need to replace the Soros-backed Socialist Katie Hobbs as Secretary of State to ensure we have truer elections in Arizona. Will you help?**

We are making strong fundraising strides, but it is nothing compared to the Socialist Billionaire dollars that back our opponents.

**We are spearheading a tremendous grassroots movement that will defeat the Radical Left. But when it is grassroots versus the Swamp, Crony Billionaires, and Big Tech, we need big dollars.**

**_There is no other way. My campaign has been grassroots from the beginning, and it will ALWAYS be that way!_**

But for us to stay the huge grassroots movement that we have become, that means every donation, great, and small, will help us.

**It also means that we need the help to sustain the momentum, so we can FINISH America’s Audit, we can AUDIT the other states, and we can protect America’s elections from the DEMOCRATS!**

[Will you help me?

_Donate as much as you can to defend America’s elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=dd043c620d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ab1c1ac8bc&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| We are in a fight for our lives for America’s elections.

**Around the country we are seeing the Democrats assault the very foundation of our Democracy.**

**_A ridiculously unjust and evil DOJ assault on the Georgia election laws._**

**_A silencing and attacking of anyone who dares suggest that the 2020 election should be audited!_**

But, friends and patriots, they have tried all of these tactics on me and more, to no avail.

**They have called me crazy. They tried to recall me. They have called me every name in the book and tried to destroy my reputation.**

**_Despite all of these we have led one of the strongest grassroots movements in American history to reclaim America and reclaim our freedoms._**

And we are making so much progress! But we cannot continue without your support!

[_Donate TODAY to save our Democracy from the Radical Left and Election Fraud! This is our last chance!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=07bad9556f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=103af873a6&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **While others remained silent after November 3rd, I stood up to be the vote of the voters. There would not have been a full-day Public Hearing on Election Integrity if I had not stood up to the establishment leaders in Arizona.**

_The establishment wanted to bury the fraud, incompetence, and mismanagement of the 2020 Presidential election in Arizona, but I said NOT ON MY WATCH! I was denied the use of the House of Representative hearing rooms, but we found another venue._

**This was so important that I fronted the cost myself. I am glad that a select group of legislators had the courage to join me and pursue the truth knowing they would face ridicule and harassment. We listened to our constituents when others blew them off.**

**_So do you want a Secretary of State that listens to constituents, gives them a voice in the process, and takes action or one who was part of the problem?_**

You have seen the attacks against me and you have seen what I have done.

**If I can do all of this as a representative in the Arizona House, imagine what I could do as Secretary of State?**

_My heart is on the table. I have bled for Election Integrity, and I will continue the fight no matter what!_

For our children, for our grandchildren.

**To all the Democrats who want to steal our Freedoms away from us, I have one thing to say.**

**_Not on my watch._**

_[Will you help me fight back?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b94ef05b28&e=44b8c466b0)_

**My name is Mark Finchem. I am the true grassroots Election Integrity Conservative.**

**_[We may not succeed without your help.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ef9e1921ba&e=44b8c466b0)_**

[_Donate as much as you can to save our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7c1d2de18b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c1757a2cca&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d3b14eed7f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---

Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737

body:
She is out of control.

| [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=fedb987cc8734154b746f22ca1f045c4&_e=qcmMI7Hx9f43r4Qezxtf9zz1yok_9K3yEJGdMiTaDCByyMT0uUO5W77dcL5ChlWb1A1ayehNQVa0MYIn9bqMSI7pHkXEwesWaN9oH-p5oQIS4847O7Bn94Nacxu4Z04PZVhrcP355zydzaIgXF2Yz_HPr5Jv3kGqG026rWMkHz3_Jba0Wa5hOLr_FlNgrnNZy9sEbLGGUy0l-7K9t0tlVBUGrSMdKyLwY34cIWt1n36zTIWg-Qh4KxF7c8sXE1nA365FmYMwZ4B0Yfv-HcsY2Z2MGSn3MyypDqxh-IEXtMJSQJLoHvLV8Qhol3nY8nDktN9pMPORNCT2sWHHxnmX0-_oX2SC2dQn6V5LrtegzrrGPzV-SbSPJ4Lrn1bLqlPblKwsn54SNACMjbkUZXed7Trdl3RYSzEDbEUcmSR1I6T_0waV2dunANBel_3VwH7kbepLRQsRGV7NulDdeWEzwQ8s_aPKQjLUoXK64h7d3J4jx6eWbB-eKUhbw1MN8KediVCjbbpijafDuPRl9d3XZaSHMxHIyaqPMXRgizCe82k%3D)
---
Friend,

How could we keep a member of Congress on a Committee of Foreign Affairs if they don’t respect and regard the safety of our country?

**Ilhan Omar has constantly attacked America and our allies, specifically Israel, and even compared our men and women in uniform to the Taliban and ISIS.** She has shown at every turn that she sides with our adversaries over America, yet Nancy Pelosi _STILL_ thinks she should be making decisions about our national security.
[**Do you think Nancy Pelosi should be fired for her inability to hold her members accountable?**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=fedb987cc8734154b746f22ca1f045c4&_e=qcmMI7Hx9f43r4Qezxtf9zz1yok_9K3yEJGdMiTaDCByyMT0uUO5W77dcL5ChlWb1A1ayehNQVa0MYIn9bqMSI7pHkXEwesWaN9oH-p5oQIS4847O7Bn94Nacxu4Z04PZVhrcP355zydzaIgXF2Yz_HPr5Jv3kGqG026rWMkHz3_Jba0Wa5hOLr_FlNgrnNZy9sEbLGGUy0l-7K9t0tlVBUGrSMdKyLwY34cIWt1n36zTIWg-Qh4KxF7c8sXE1nA365FmYMwZ4B0Yfv-HcsY2Z2MGSn3MyypDqxh-IEXtMJSQJLoHvLV8Qhol3nY8nDktN9pMPORNCT2sWHHxnmX07_uU2c0rmEAb8i1lvHTpsvE-JC8caFaxh1PukhdCnvL9j4FZD9Czj_O7R6YhPJU-TBVOXNKnWk5S25RIvsa93c2CsEv85gXgl67RJh_ordjKlJr_KzvTerBAV9pczc_5Q2M10ubyF1zDGpFk7x_aCQQ_rxYRiysvghcltRA90KuTXZhAA7nJO8jUfRJaQC3JoXQ7yHyFvsc2AlCsoqRDfs%3D)
| [**ANSWER HERE**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=fedb987cc8734154b746f22ca1f045c4&_e=qcmMI7Hx9f43r4Qezxtf9zz1yok_9K3yEJGdMiTaDCByyMT0uUO5W77dcL5ChlWb1A1ayehNQVa0MYIn9bqMSI7pHkXEwesWaN9oH-p5oQIS4847O7Bn94Nacxu4Z04PZVhrcP355zydzaIgXF2Yz_HPr5Jv3kGqG026rWMkHz3_Jba0Wa5hOLr_FlNgrnNZy9sEbLGGUy0l-7K9t0tlVBUGrSMdKyLwY34cIWt1n36zTIWg-Qh4KxF7c8sXE1nA365FmYMwZ4B0Yfv-HcsY2Z2MGSn3MyypDqxh-IEXtMJSQJLoHvLV8Qhol3nY8nDktN9pMPORNCT2sWHHxnmX08Gv1guv640qS_yz2JvO6OCkloYIApxZxoa6siakHqrqhHQRIB8NSCxNUVqb3xffJwulXzdjw-qdXiSTruRHNTNsUUNtADsOT0MgtH-f2CUO_fIzf8WzeG-sqVzaQtRF8COVlIEmTXboRPJPyF0Fkr69XRdt9jgacU2H2SxKhQoYBrS33BYZTGLAWmsev7S3-kGIHFzVuc2so2c3F0l-mbc%3D)
---

As a veteran, it makes me sick that we have someone who would compare our troops to terrorists making foreign policy decisions at the highest level. But I’m smart enough to know that Pelosi won’t do anything about it. **It’s up to us to act and ensure Pelosi won’t be Speaker next term by Taking Back the House.**

I need to know what you think. It’s time to Take Back the House and stop allowing the Radical Left to put our nation at risk.

God Bless,
Congresswoman Miller-Meeks
[](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=fedb987cc8734154b746f22ca1f045c4&_e=qcmMI7Hx9f43r4Qezxtf9zz1yok_9K3yEJGdMiTaDCByyMT0uUO5W77dcL5ChlWb1A1ayehNQVa0MYIn9bqMSI7pHkXEwesWaN9oH-p5oQIS4847O7Bn94Nacxu4Z04PZVhrcP355zydzaIgXF2Yz_HPr5Jv3kGqG026rWMkHz3_Jba0Wa5hOLr_FlNgrnNZy9sEbLGGUy0l-7K9t0tlVBUGrSMdKyLwY34cIWt1n36zTIWg-Qh4KxF7c8sXE1nA365FmYMwZ4B0Yfv-HcsY2Z2MGSn3MyypDqxh-IEXtMJSQJLoHvLV8Qhol3nY8nDktN9pMPORNCT2sWHHxnmX04UNCdCdEhzyuQYIOJLcMpMECLlWvitTjuEcT41JM8m1My2_YvUIWq1uu9S0QK20IpdLYc4zAg9wHGxWPz_pr4d5el5m2XQJWvgv3nfmIBLdr-bQXvBX9Tjm0oe4egP8ftKMq72LPzc-NwlrEEHhvcLjs8B73w0kmBjbk9J7pzjmQb9R3B-zcX0i_BOX4cSQWmdpph004iQoHCXsjvqeJfY%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matt=20Royer?=
subject: on this Independence Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by KTBBH PAC
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us8.campaign-archive.com/?e=76fc145c69&u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=1370d635fa)
---
| | [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=418e189b9e&e=76fc145c69)
---
| |
---
| Folks -

Over the past few years, it was increasingly difficult to celebrate the 4th of July. Patriotism, the Flag, and what it means to “be an American” were very much co-opted by white nationalists, groups of people who used greed, hate, racism, and bigotry to define what the United States stood for. The majority of people would disagree with them but it still doesn’t make it any easier to determine someone’s intentions these days when they wave the Flag.
---
|
---
| I still find myself having trouble finding what this day truly means or if it is really worth celebrating. It makes you realize that there are groups of people who may have never felt that pride that many of us had felt more disassociated with over the past few years. It makes you realize that even though our President may have changed, it still takes intentionality to make sure that all are welcome, even those who may disagree with you. It’s not enough to put signs up and speak within echo chambers. You have to help make that space in the term “American” truly for everyone who wants to be here.

I have said this before and will say it every year, the most patriotic thing you can do is to help improve your country.

When you care about something, you want to work to improve it and that sometimes means criticizing it. Whether it’s your community, your Party, or your country, working to improve it and make it work better for everyone is the best thing you can do. And that’s what activists, organizers, candidates, and elected officials do every day because bringing everyone’s ideas together make it harder to miss things.

It’s time to take back what is patriotic and who is an American as we work with one another over the next 4 years. Time to open the doors, make space at the table, and truly build back better because we have the freedom to do that.

Still proud to be an American. Hope you had a happy and safe 4th.
